mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_library_sessions (user_id, topic_id, session_type, questions_json, status, correct_count, total_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{sessionType}, #{questionsJson}, #{status}, #{correctCount}, #{totalCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, session_type, questions_json, status, correct_count, total_count, started_at, completed_at FROM grammar_library_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND topic_id = #{topicId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY completed_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, session_type, questions_json, status, correct_count, total_count, started_at, completed_at FROM grammar_library_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY completed_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_library_session_answers (session_id, question_ref, submitted_answer, correct) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{questionRef}, #{submittedAnswer}, #{correct})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, question_ref, submitted_answer, correct, answered_at FROM grammar_library_session_answers WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY answered_at
